policy_name: MedSafe-GATE v1 DDID Evidence Lookup Guard
description: Evidence-first inference policy for MediFoodShield Paper 1.

rules.rule: If an exact Drug_ID and Food_Herb_ID pair exists in DDID lookup table, return the DDID-derived paper_label with evidence fields.
If no exact DDID pair exists, run MedSafe-GATE v1 calibrated LinearSVC model.
Apply safety gate to No known interaction predictions. If confidence is below selected threshold, output Use caution.
Never call a pair clinically safe. Use No known interaction in selected source only when supported by the selected source or high-confidence model branch.

balanced_safety.purpose: Better balance between macro F1 and false-safe reduction.

strict_screening.purpose: Lower false-safe rate with more conservative caution outputs.
